headline: GE Vernova Enters S&P 100 As Electrification And Grid Bets Grow
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has been added to the S&P 100 index, increasing its visibility with large institutional investors and index funds. The company is expanding its electrification and grid infrastructure business, including a major wind turbine supply contract in Italy and new grid solution investments in Europe. These moves highlight GE Vernova's role in large scale energy transition projects and AI driven infrastructure build outs. GE Vernova now sits inside the S&P 100, putting it on...
